content:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary function of framing in the data link layer?",
      "options": ["A) To add error detection and correction mechanisms", "B) To segment data into smaller packets", "C) To establish connectionless or connection-oriented communication", "D) To manage flow control"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Framing is the process of dividing data into smaller packets or frames, which makes it easier to transmit over a physical medium."
